meta.description: Full appointment lifecycle automation: booking confirmation -> 24hr reminder -> 1hr reminder -> confirm/reschedule reply handling -> no-show follow-up -> cancellation recovery. Portfolio demo — all credentials, phone numbers, and account IDs below are placeholders.

nodes.name: 1. Appointment Booked (Webhook)
nodes.notes: Triggered from GHL Workflow: Appointment Status = Booked/Confirmed.

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: You're booked! {{$json.service}} confirmed for {{$json.start_time}}. We'll send reminders as it gets closer.

nodes.name: 4. Wait Until 24hr Before Appointment
nodes.notes: In GHL native workflow, use 'Wait Until Appointment Time - 24 hours' built-in option. In n8n, calculate delay dynamically from start_time.

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Hi {{$json.first_name}}, reminder: your appointment is tomorrow at {{$json.start_time}}. Reply CONFIRM to confirm or RESCHEDULE if you need to change it.

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Reminder: your appointment is in 1 hour. See you soon!

sub_workflows.name: Confirmation Reply Handler
sub_workflows.description: Separate GHL workflow. Trigger: Customer Replied (keyword filter). If reply contains 'CONFIRM' -> update appointment status to Confirmed, tag 'appointment-confirmed'. If reply contains 'RESCHEDULE' -> resend booking link, tag 'needs-reschedule', notify rep.

sub_workflows.name: No-Show Follow-up
sub_workflows.description: Separate GHL workflow. Trigger: Appointment Status = No Show. Send SMS offering reschedule link, tag 'no-show-followup'. Wait 24hr, if not rebooked send 2nd follow-up.

sub_workflows.name: Cancellation Recovery
sub_workflows.description: Separate GHL workflow. Trigger: Appointment Status = Cancelled. Send SMS with new booking link to recover the lost slot.
